name: RomReal Limited
summary: RomReal Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in property investment and development in Romania. The company owns a portfolio of properties, primarily in Constanta and Ovidiu. Its plots are primarily suited for residential and commercial developments. As of December 31, 2020, the company's land bank comprised 267,914 square meters. RomReal Limited was founded in 2005 and is based in Hamilton, Bermuda.
